goal: disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) = (open_upper_ray(lower).contains(x) and open_upper_ray(lower).contains(y) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not open_upper_ray(lower).contains(z))

p.c: function(x0: lib(set).Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and x2 ∈ x0 and x1 < x2 and x1 <= x3 and x3 <= x2 and not x3 ∈ x0) = disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z)
not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) or (x ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and y ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not z ∈ open_upper_ray(lower))
not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) or (x ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and y ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y)
not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) or (x ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and y ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and x < y and x <= z)
not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) or (x ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and y ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and x < y)
not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) or (x ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and y ∈ open_upper_ray(lower))
not (x ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and y ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not z ∈ open_upper_ray(lower)) or disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z)
not (x ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and y ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y) or disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) or z ∈ open_upper_ray(lower)
not (x ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and y ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and x < y and x <= z) or not z <= y or disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) or z ∈ open_upper_ray(lower)
not (x ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and y ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and x < y) or not z <= y or not x <= z or disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) or z ∈ open_upper_ray(lower)
not (x ∈ open_upper_ray(lower) and y ∈ open_upper_ray(lower)) or not x < y or not z <= y or not x <= z or disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) or z ∈ open_upper_ray(lower)
function(x0: lib(set).Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) } = is_connected_real_set(x0) }(open_upper_ray(lower))
not is_connected_real_set(open_upper_ray(lower)) or forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x0, x1, x2) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(open_upper_ray(lower)) or forall(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x0, x1, x2) } = true })
(forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(open_upper_ray(lower)) or forall(x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x0, x1, x2) } = true })
(forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(open_upper_ray(lower)) or not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x0, x1, x2) })
not forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x0, x1, x2) } or is_connected_real_set(open_upper_ray(lower))
exists(k0: Real, k1: Real, k2: Real) { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), k0, k1, k2) } or is_connected_real_set(open_upper_ray(lower))
exists(k0: Real, k1: Real, k2: Real) { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), k0, k1, k2) }
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, k0, k1) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { exists(k2: Real) { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w1, k2) } }
let w2: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w1, w2) }
let w3: Real satisfy { exists(k3: Real) { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w3, k3) } }
let w4: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w3, w4) }
let w5: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w3, w5) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x0, x1, x2) or false = true }(w0, w3, w5)
not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w3, w5)
